ayahs.arabic: كِتَٰبٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِى صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِّنْهُ لِتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: A Book revealed to you—let there be no distress in your heart from it—that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.
ayahs.summary: Revelation is for warning and remembrance.

ayahs.arabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ ۗ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Follow what has been sent down to you from your Lord, and do not follow allies besides Him. Little do you remember.
ayahs.summary: Follow revelation; do not take other protectors.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنَٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيَٰتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَآئِلُونَ
ayahs.translation: And how many cities have We destroyed? Our punishment came to them by night or while they were resting at noon.
ayahs.summary: Past nations were destroyed when they were heedless.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: So their cry, when Our punishment came to them, was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
ayahs.summary: They admitted wrongdoing only when punishment came.
